intro: Apple has filed a lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging that former Apple employees retained access to the company's systems after joining OpenAI. Software engineers are adapting to AI-driven disruption in their field, which has caused layoffs and underemployment despite the profession's historically high pay. Microsoft's Copilot+ PCs aim to offer local AI capabilities and improved battery life, though they come with strict hardware requirements.

whitelist.title: The biggest bombshells from Apple's trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI
whitelist.desc: In a filing, Apple says former employees working for OpenAI retained access to the iPhone maker's systems after leaving.

whitelist.title: Chasing new skills, going back to basics and pushing for collective action: how software engineers are adapting to AI
whitelist.desc: Software engineering was one of the best-paying professions in the US in 2022, but the advent of AI has disrupted it, leading to several layoffs and underemployment

whitelist.title: What are Copilot+ PCs? Everything you need to know
whitelist.desc: Copilot+ PCs promise smarter Windows search, local AI tools, and longer battery life, though the badge comes with strict hardware rules and several important caveats.

whitelist.title: What are your plans for AI Appreciation Day? - Engadget
whitelist.desc: The best way to celebrate AI Appreciation Day is to not.

whitelist.title: AI Isn't Killing Education. It's Exposing What Was Already Broken.

whitelist.title: Why AI Pilots Fail: A 1998 Paper Might Have Seen It Coming
whitelist.desc: Most AI strategies are vocabulary, not capability. A study of quality management from the nineties named the pattern long before AI arrived.

whitelist.title: AI Might Be Coming For Our Books–But These Books Fight Back

whitelist.title: Apple Sues OpenAI For Trade Secret Theft After Integrating ChatGPT
whitelist.desc: Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft, exposing new details about its AI hardware ambitions and intensifying the race for next-gen devices.

whitelist.desc: Anthropic's J-space research reveals AI's hidden reasoning workspace without claiming the models possess consciousness or feelings.

whitelist.title: Apple’s failed self-driving car program left a legacy of powerful AI chips

whitelist.desc: Tang Jie says AI security comes from openness, not barriers, just as Beijing weighs restricting overseas access to China's best open models.

whitelist.title: Congress's AI bill pile-up: cure cancer, cage chatbots

whitelist.title: China's coding tools gain as Claude Code is flagged

whitelist.title: I tried to parody the most absurd AI products, but the tech industry beat me to it

whitelist.title: Starbucks Just Fired A Warning Shot At Microsoft And IBM AI Apps

whitelist.title: The fight against AI data centers is just beginning

whitelist.title: I'm a writer who left LA for an AI startup in San Francisco. It was like stepping into a whole new world.

whitelist.title: Scientists’ Side Hustle? Using AI and Quantum Computing to Generate New Peptides

whitelist.desc: My Copilot+ PC has dedicated AI hardware and its own Copilot key, yet Microsoft’s assistant has barely earned a place in my daily workflow.
